channel.title: Lodz Papers in Pragmatics
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Lodz Papers in Pragmatics

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Anna Bączkowska, Barbara Lewandowska-Tomaszczyk, Slavko Žitnik, Chaya Liebeskind, Marcin Trojszczak, Giedre Valunaite Oleskeviciene DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lpp-2024-frontmatter2

item.title: Introduction to the Special Issue: Pragmatics, digital content and opinions
item.description: Article by Anna Bączkowska, Barbara Lewandowska-Tomaszczyk, Slavko Žitnik, Chaya Liebeskind, Marcin Trojszczak, Giedre Valunaite Oleskeviciene DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lpp-2024-0060

item.title: Discursive news values analysis: the case of Liz Truss’ representation in the British press
item.description: Article by Anna Bączkowska, Barbara Lewandowska-Tomaszczyk, Slavko Žitnik, Chaya Liebeskind, Marcin Trojszczak, Giedre Valunaite Oleskeviciene DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lpp-2024-0032

item.title: The case of romantic relationships: analysis of the use of metaphorical frames with ‘traditional family’ and related terms in political Telegram posts in three countries and three languages
item.description: Article by Anna Bączkowska, Barbara Lewandowska-Tomaszczyk, Slavko Žitnik, Chaya Liebeskind, Marcin Trojszczak, Giedre Valunaite Oleskeviciene DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lpp-2024-0035

item.title: Expressing anger on Mexican X/Twitter: the case of Uber customer complaints
item.description: Article by Anna Bączkowska, Barbara Lewandowska-Tomaszczyk, Slavko Žitnik, Chaya Liebeskind, Marcin Trojszczak, Giedre Valunaite Oleskeviciene DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lpp-2024-0033

item.title: Expressing negative opinions through metaphor and simile in popular music reviews
item.description: Article by Anna Bączkowska, Barbara Lewandowska-Tomaszczyk, Slavko Žitnik, Chaya Liebeskind, Marcin Trojszczak, Giedre Valunaite Oleskeviciene DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lpp-2024-0036

item.title: Slur reclamation, irony, and resilience
item.description: Article by Anna Bączkowska, Barbara Lewandowska-Tomaszczyk, Slavko Žitnik, Chaya Liebeskind, Marcin Trojszczak, Giedre Valunaite Oleskeviciene DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lpp-2024-0029

item.title: What is the authentic internet register before & after the Russian invasion in Ukraine? Polish and Czech YouTube comments from 2021–2023
item.description: Article by Anna Bączkowska, Barbara Lewandowska-Tomaszczyk, Slavko Žitnik, Chaya Liebeskind, Marcin Trojszczak, Giedre Valunaite Oleskeviciene DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lpp-2024-0026

item.title: Application of natural language processing for the recognition of obesity-related topics in the discourses of Argentine Twitter users
item.description: Article by Anna Bączkowska, Barbara Lewandowska-Tomaszczyk, Slavko Žitnik, Chaya Liebeskind, Marcin Trojszczak, Giedre Valunaite Oleskeviciene DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lpp-2024-0031

item.title: Opinion events and stance types: advances in LLM performance with ChatGPT and Gemini
item.description: Article by Anna Bączkowska, Barbara Lewandowska-Tomaszczyk, Slavko Žitnik, Chaya Liebeskind, Marcin Trojszczak, Giedre Valunaite Oleskeviciene DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lpp-2024-0039

item.title: Classifying offensive language in Arabic: a novel taxonomy and dataset
item.description: Article by Anna Bączkowska, Barbara Lewandowska-Tomaszczyk, Slavko Žitnik, Chaya Liebeskind, Marcin Trojszczak, Giedre Valunaite Oleskeviciene DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lpp-2024-0034

item.title: Implicit offensive language taxonomy
item.description: Article by Anna Bączkowska, Barbara Lewandowska-Tomaszczyk, Slavko Žitnik, Chaya Liebeskind, Marcin Trojszczak, Giedre Valunaite Oleskeviciene DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lpp-2024-0049
